Book A Feast for Crows (mentioned)

Jasper Arryn was a head of House Arryn whose titles included Lord of the Eyrie, Defender of the Vale, and Warden of the East.[1][3]

He was the father of Jon, Alys and Ronnel Arryn.[1]
